channel.title: Jag Jeondian De Mele on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Jag Jeondian De Mele on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Jag Jeondian De Mele - Movie Review
item.description: aakhir mainu mauka lag gia Jag Jeondian De Mele dekhan da. is movie ch sab ton wakhri gal k Harbhajan Mann ne pehli wari kise alag director naal movie kiti hai. bilkul use taran movie b alag hai. kahani b alag, actor b alag te nateeja b wadia . Harbhajan Maan di acting b pehlan naalo alag te wadia hai. ik bilkul navi kahani hon karke man mohndi hai film. Ghuggi done role bahut sohne nibhaunda te baki actor b apne apne kam ch khare uttare ne.
